item.title: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
item.description: CBP told Judge Richard Eaton that the technology upgrades it plans would save more than 4 million man-hours in processing refunds for Trump's tariffs.

item.title: Trump says no deal with Iran to end war without 'unconditional surrender'
item.description: The futures price of the global benchmark Brent crude oil rose, breaking $90 per barrel, after Trump posted his demand to Iran to end the war.

item.title: Analysis: Tough jobs report puts Trump's Iran war plans to the test
item.description: The economy is showing signs of slowing as the Iran war quickly pushes up gas prices.

item.title: Trump hints U.S. will turn to Cuba after Iran: 'Just a question of time'
item.description: The Cuba comments show Trump, less than a week into an escalating military conflict in Iran, is considering another major foreign policy move.

item.title: How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
item.description: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.
